title: otites nutans
intro: Otites nutans, also known as Ear Drop Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe earaches and ear infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Otites nutans include relief from ear pain, reduced inflammation, and even treatment of certain fungal infections. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally, depending on the desired application.
